creator: wacky@sonic.soniclink.net
text:
Well when I was picoing a file a users eggdrop.conf my telnet frozed. So i 
thought it was a dos attack witch when I re telneted 5 mins later the box
was up and i typed uptime and it said 3mins. I pico'ed the logs and did
grep root /var/log/messages. I picoed everything that it would log it to.
It didnt have anything about anybody doing the reboot command it didnt say any errors
or kernel panics. But before it rebooted I got something about a icmp.
Please tell me what might be wrong because im keeping with FreeBSD3.2.
It just reboots without giveing any msgs at all and I have no reason why.

Fix: 

none
How-To-Repeat: Dont know
